industrial.title: Industrial Facilities
industrial.desc: Factories, warehouses, logistics centers, and organized industrial zone structures. Engineering solutions tailored to sectoral needs.

renovation.title: Restoration & Renovation

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Reliable engineering, sustainable projects
about.content:
AYT Grup is an engineering and construction brand focused on reliable execution and solution-oriented project delivery in infrastructure and superstructure works. In projects for both public and private sectors, we combine technical accuracy, disciplined planning, and quality-focused completion.

With our expert technical team and modern management approach, we prioritize occupational safety, environmental responsibility, and client satisfaction in every project. Our goal is to create long-term value through structures that make a lasting contribution to the sector.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: We apply the highest quality standards at every stage, from material selection to final handover, and we stand behind our work.

trust.title: Trust
trust.desc: The trust we build with our clients is our most valuable asset. We deliver what we promise.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: By following the latest technologies and methods in the industry, we add value to our projects and build tomorrow's structures today.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.desc: Through eco-friendly construction methods and energy-efficient designs, we fulfil our responsibility to nature and future generations.

mission.title: Mission & Vision
mission.missionContent: To contribute to our country's development by delivering reliable, innovative, and sustainable solutions in infrastructure and superstructure projects. To prioritize occupational safety, environmental awareness, and client satisfaction in every project.
mission.visionContent: To become a leading and exemplary construction brand by combining quality, trust, and innovation, and to develop projects that shape future needs through a modern management approach.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Certificates that document our quality and reliability

iso9001.title: ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System
iso9001.desc: ISO 9001 certification documenting that products and services are managed to international quality standards.

iso14001.title: ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management System
iso14001.desc: ISO 14001 certification managing our environmental impacts and documenting sustainable practices.

ohsas18001.title: OHSAS 18001 Occupational Health & Safety
ohsas18001.desc: Document showing our compliance with international standards in employee health and occupational safety management.

tse.title: TSE Service Competence Certificate
tse.desc: Service quality and competence certificate issued by the Turkish Standards Institution.

home.title: AYT Grup Construction | Ankara Contractor
home.description: AYT Grup Construction provides reliable contracting services for residential, commercial, and industrial projects in Ankara. Our core business is construction and project development.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Reviews from our satisfied clients
testimonials.testimonial1: Working with AYT Grup is a privilege. Project management on the Söğütözü Plaza was excellent in terms of time and budget. Highly recommended.
testimonials.testimonial2: On our Etimesgut residential project, quality and reliability exceeded our expectations. Thank you for your client-focused approach.
testimonials.testimonial3: The professionalism and technical competence on the Sincan Logistics Center project were truly impressive. The AYT Grup team supported us in every way.
